opinion.h4: STANDARD DREDGING CORP. v. ALABAMA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ALABAMA. No. 332. Decided October 24, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Eberhard P. Deutsch, Rene H. Himel, Jr. and Malcolm W. Monroe for appellant.
MacDonald Gallion, Attorney General of Alabama, Guy Sparks, Special Assistant Attorney General, and William H. Burton, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
